title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Franky, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Franky, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: all over her face and body.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It's not like it's someone else...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: So it must be her old photo....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She was a servant somewhere before, too?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: She was alive!! She's not dead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: ... but if that obituary is real,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the hell? It's getting even creepier....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It was better not to know that...!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Franky, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.
